scenario_scope: synthetic living-book intake decisions for future AI-related sources

cases.decision_rationale: The hypothetical source refines context-adequacy vocabulary but does not introduce a distinct stack boundary.
required_before_drafting: add exact claim mapping before strengthening prose
evidence_transition_preconditions: evidence transition accepted before support promotion
promotion_blockers: no real source has been evaluated
non_claims: does not evaluate a real paper

cases.decision_rationale: The hypothetical source owns a new interface, invariant, artifact type, and failure mode not covered by an existing chapter.
required_before_drafting: confirm no existing chapter owns the boundary
create proposed chapter job in outline
define source queue and proof tags
promotion_blockers: placeholder chapter id is not a real manifest change
non_claims: does not add a real chapter
does not claim the hypothetical interface is needed

cases.decision_rationale: A title named by another source is not support until the referenced work is directly retrieved and checked.
required_before_drafting: write source note or mark missing
non_claims: does not cite the external reference as support

cases.decision_rationale: A hypothetical export repeats an already inventoried source without new claims, mechanisms, or evidence artifacts.
evidence_transition_preconditions: variant comparison recorded if any claim changes
non_claims: does not promote the duplicate variant

validation_boundary: Validates synthetic decision shape only; no real paper, source text, or chapter insertion was evaluated.
non_claims: does not run real new-paper triage
does not change book_structure.json chapter order
